user_story: As an HR admin, I want to add a new time off approver, so that leave requests are routed to the correct approver by location.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Time Off Approvers screen; When I click Add new time off approver and select locations, approvers, and loss of pay approvers; Then the mapping is saved and listed

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to view time off approvers by location, approver, and loss of pay approver, so that I can verify approval routing.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Time Off Approvers screen; When the list loads; Then I see the Location(s), Approver(s), and Loss of pay approver(s) columns

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to configure a separate loss of pay approver, so that unpaid leave requests are approved by the right role.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am adding or editing a time off approver; When I set the Loss of pay approver(s); Then the loss of pay routing is saved with the mapping

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to edit an existing time off approver mapping, so that I can update approvers or covered locations.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Time Off Approvers screen; When I click Edit on a mapping row and change its details; Then the changes are saved

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to page through the time off approvers list, so that I can navigate all configured mappings.
acceptance_criteria: Given the time off approvers list has multiple pages; When I click Next; Then the next page of mappings is displayed
